demo-stdio.description: Demo MCP via STDIO with basic tools (ping, users, echo) — works fully offline

demo-http.description: Demo MCP via HTTP without authentication (mcp-test-servers)

demo-http-oauth.description: Demo MCP via HTTP with OAuth authentication mock (mcp-test-servers)

demo-sse.description: Demo MCP via SSE streaming transport (mcp-test-servers)

demo-stdio-params.description: Demo MCP with parameterized tools (read/write/list/stats) and env DEMO_MODE
